overall.description: Game engine footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a stormy night landscape illuminated by a handheld torch. The character travels from a wooded riverside path through grassy meadows to a sandy beach, with heavy rain and wind effects visible throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy riverside dirt path with tree line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, rain falling heavily

entered.detail: dark flowing water visible to the left of the path
muddy dirt trail winding through the landscape
dense trees and bushes lining the right side of the path
illuminated castle or city visible on the distant hillside
dark turbulent clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night with the character walking along a dirt path beside a river. Trees line the right side while storm clouds obscure the sky. A distant castle glows faintly on the horizon as rain falls steadily.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to grassy meadow with wildflowers
villager carrying a bundle runs past from right to left, crossing the character's path

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and wildflowers, briefly turning toward a passing villager

notable_agents.action: villager carrying a bundle on their back runs past from right to left

entered.detail: open field of tall green grass replacing the dirt path
white and yellow flowers scattered throughout the grass

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt path and enters a wide grassy meadow filled with wildflowers. The trees recede into the background as the space opens up. A villager runs past carrying a bundle, and the character briefly turns to acknowledge them before continuing through the rain-soaked field.

agents.ego_description: walking along a coastal path with the sea visible to the left

entered.detail: rocky outcrops appearing on the right side of the path
distant mountains visible through the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Leaving the meadow behind, the character returns to a dirt path running alongside the water. The landscape becomes rockier with coastal formations visible. The distant castle remains in view ahead as the character approaches the shoreline.

events.description: ground changes from dirt to sand, reaching the beach shoreline with waves

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach with waves lapping at the shore to the left

entered.detail: wet sand replacing the dirt path along the water's edge
waves crashing and foaming on the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the beach where the dirt path gives way to wet sand. Waves crash against the shore as the character walks along the coastline. The storm continues with heavy rain and wind as the torch illuminates the immediate area against the dark ocean and night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a stormy night landscape that transforms from a wooded riverside path into a windswept coastal beach. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside a river under heavy rain, with a distant castle glowing faintly on the horizon. As the character leaves the path, the scene opens into a wide, rain-soaked meadow filled with wildflowers where a villager briefly runs past. The environment then shifts back to a rocky dirt path that leads toward the water, bringing the distant castle into closer view before the terrain finally gives way to wet sand. The movement concludes along the shoreline, where the torch illuminates the immediate area against crashing waves and a dark, stormy ocean.
